_warnings_note: Svelte 5's `svelte_component_deprecated` warning fires too — emitted at the open-tag position. Filtered out of the expected list because it's a Svelte compiler warning, not a tsgo diagnostic.
_note: Reviewer item #1b: `<svelte:component this={cmp} value="not-a-number" />` routes through `__svn_ensure_component(cmp); new $$_C({ target, props: { value: "not-a-number" } })`. The wrong-type prop fires TS2322 at the directive's value position. Pre-fix `<svelte:component>` fell through to a bare `{` scope and the `value` prop went un-checked entirely.
